tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyerAccountsGet
tools.description: Gets one account by ID.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyerAccountsList
tools.description: Retrieves the authenticated user's list of accounts.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyerAccountsPatch
tools.description: Updates an existing account. This method supports patch semantics.

tools.name: accounts.adexchangebuyerAccountsUpdate
tools.description: Updates an existing account.

tools.name: billingInfo.adexchangebuyerBillingInfoGet
tools.description: Returns the billing information for one account specified by account ID.

tools.name: billingInfo.adexchangebuyerBillingInfoList
tools.description: Retrieves a list of billing information for all accounts of the authenticated user.

tools.name: budget.adexchangebuyerBudgetGet
tools.description: Returns the budget information for the adgroup specified by the accountId and billingId.

tools.name: budget.adexchangebuyerBudgetPatch
tools.description: Updates the budget amount for the budget of the adgroup specified by the accountId and billingId, with the budget amount in the request. This method supports patch semantics.

tools.name: budget.adexchangebuyerBudgetUpdate
tools.description: Updates the budget amount for the budget of the adgroup specified by the accountId and billingId, with the budget amount in the request.

tools.name: creatives.adexchangebuyerCreativesAddDeal
tools.description: Add a deal id association for the creative.

tools.name: creatives.adexchangebuyerCreativesGet
tools.description: Gets the status for a single creative. A creative will be available 30-40 minutes after submission.

tools.name: creatives.adexchangebuyerCreativesInsert
tools.description: Submit a new creative.

tools.name: creatives.adexchangebuyerCreativesList
tools.description: Retrieves a list of the authenticated user's active creatives. A creative will be available 30-40 minutes after submission.

tools.name: creatives.adexchangebuyerCreativesListDeals
tools.description: Lists the external deal ids associated with the creative.

tools.name: creatives.adexchangebuyerCreativesRemoveDeal
tools.description: Remove a deal id associated with the creative.

tools.name: marketplacedeals.adexchangebuyerMarketplacedealsDelete

tools.name: marketplacedeals.adexchangebuyerMarketplacedealsList
tools.description: List all the deals for a given proposal

tools.name: marketplacedeals.adexchangebuyerMarketplacedealsUpdate
tools.description: Replaces all the deals in the proposal with the passed in deals

tools.name: marketplacenotes.adexchangebuyerMarketplacenotesList
tools.description: Get all the notes associated with a proposal

tools.name: marketplaceprivateauction.adexchangebuyerMarketplaceprivateauctionUpdateproposal
tools.description: Update a given private auction proposal

tools.name: performanceReport.adexchangebuyerPerformanceReportList
tools.description: Retrieves the authenticated user's list of performance metrics.

tools.name: pretargetingConfig.adexchangebuyerPretargetingConfigDelete

tools.name: pretargetingConfig.adexchangebuyerPretargetingConfigUpdate
tools.description: Updates an existing pretargeting config.
